diagrams.title: Class Structure and Access Specifiers
diagrams.description: Shows how a class is organized with private, protected, and public sections
diagrams.purpose: Understanding class layout and member accessibility boundaries

diagrams.title: Object Creation and Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how objects are created from class blueprint and memory allocation
elements: Separate memory for each object's data members
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the relationship between class and objects in memory

diagrams.title: Constructor and Destructor Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of an object from creation to destruction
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when constructors and destructors are invoked
